description: A customer needs to cancel their booking for a wine tasting tour.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the tour booking using the customer's name or booking ID.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the correct tour reservation.
Agent finds that the cancellation is more than 48 hours in advance and is eligible for a full refund.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the booking and process the refund.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully cancels the tour and initiates a full refund.
